title: stelis stolonifera
intro: Stelis stolonifera, also known as the Chain-stem Stelis, is a type of orchid species native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stelis stolonifera include treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing fever and pain. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
